svg.desc: Three interleaved sets of concentric circles representing X, Y, and Z axes. Each set has three rings for layer indices 0, 1, 2. The three centers form an isosceles triangle, and circle intersections create slanted-square (diamond-like) regions.

g.title: [z:2] B move rotates this circle counter-clockwise.
[z:1] S move rotates this circle clockwise. (follows F)
[z:0] F move rotates this circle clockwise.
[y:0] D move rotates this circle counter-clockwise.
[y:1] E move rotates this circle counter-clockwise. (follows D)
[y:2] U move rotates this circle clockwise.
[x:0] L move rotates this circle counter-clockwise.
[x:1] M move rotates this circle counter-clockwise. (follows L)
[x:2] R move rotates this circle clockwise.
